input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.6.2.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.6.2.5
            TITLE: high pressure fuel pump – must be rigidly mounted to structural engine components such as

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.6.2.5: High Pressure Fuel Pump – must be rigidly mounted to structural engine components such as
IC.6.2.5 High Pressure Fuel Pump – must be rigidly mounted to structural engine components such as 
the cylinder head or engine block.

final_answer: High Pressure Fuel Pump – must be rigidly mounted to structural engine components such as the cylinder head or engine block.
